name: preset-api-skills
description: Preset API skills for authentication, workspace discovery, administration, Superset workspace APIs, Snowflake Cortex Agents, and security-sensitive direct API workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Authenticate with Preset, administer teams/workspaces, use Superset APIs, Snowflake Cortex Agents, and sensitive direct API workflows.
interface.longDescription: Markdown skills for agents using the public Preset Management API, workspace Superset APIs, and Snowflake Cortex Agent APIs. Includes guarded authentication guidance, workspace discovery, admin workflows for memberships, invites, roles, audits, version-aware Superset OpenAPI discovery, dashboard/chart, dataset/database, SQL Lab, import/export, embedding, guest-token, RLS, database-connection, role/permission, destructive-import, and Cortex Agent guidance. MCP tool workflows are intentionally handled by the separate preset-mcp-skills package.
defaultPrompt: List audit logs for my Preset team
List dashboards in a Preset workspace
Review a Preset SQL execution request
Run a Snowflake Cortex Agent safely
